name: Google Workspace Stale Active Accounts (90 days)
description: Detects active google_workspace accounts with no recent login activity for 90 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_login_time AS last_login FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (u.last_login_time IS NULL OR u.last_login_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
remediation: Review stale accounts and disable or deprovision access if no valid business need exists.
